user.description:
Search your city. Set input to your city name or coordinates.
 The city name is prioritized if both name and coordinates are provided.

finish.title: Configuration complete
finish.description: The Vigieau integration has been successfully configured.

error.data_fetch_error: Error fetching data from Vigieau API.
error.invalid_location: Invalid location provided. Please check the coordinates or city name.
error.address_not_found: The specified address could not be found. Please check the input and try again.

abort.no_address_provided: No address provided. Please enter a valid city name or coordinates.
